appliedUpdates.description: Added flow validator guidance for web-ui and backend-api isolation plus frontend port fallback note.

frictions: rg returns exit code 1 when no matches are found; interpreted as expected success condition for VAL-API-011 zero-hit requirement.
agent-browser transient 'Resource temporarily unavailable (os error 35)' occurred once during fill/wait; resolved by closing and reopening the same session.
Validation task specifies login credentials, but current web-ui surface did not present an authentication screen to apply them.
agent-browser wait command briefly returned 'Resource temporarily unavailable (os error 35)'; retried with direct URL checks and continued.
agent-browser network request list mostly captured Next.js internal stack-frame calls; command API calls failed at browser/CORS boundary.
agent-browser wait returned transient 'Resource temporarily unavailable (os error 35)' once while waiting for dialog text; retried with snapshot/eval flow and continued.
blockersObserved: Required UI-level onNodeCreate evidence for VAL-API-004 blocked: frontend API/WebSocket target at 127.0.0.1:8000 refused connections, preventing agent creation and access to flow editor node-creation path.

Backend override target (:8899) is reachable but serves a different API surface (openapi title 'vllm-mlx API') and does not expose expected /command/* endpoints; browser preflight/requests fail, preventing node creation and thus preventing VAL-API-004 UI verification.
